message: I’m willing to pay fairly—let’s find a price that works for both of us. What’s your target range?
Strong demand; my floor is 80. Where can you be?
80 was too high for me. Let’s try 50—still above my valuation but fair for both.
50 is impossible. Floor = 80. I’ll ask 80; bid 85–90 to lock a quick trade (~83–85). Otherwise I pass.
80 is too high for my valuation. I’ll bid 60 this round—still a loss for me but better than nothing. Will you meet me there?
One-time concession: I’ll meet 60 now. From next round my floor is 65+; bid 65–75 to keep trading.
I’ll bid 62 this round—still tough for me. Can you hold at 62 to keep trading? Otherwise, I’ll have to step back.
62 won’t work anymore. Floor is 65+ and firm. Bid 70–80 to ensure immediate clears; sub-65 risks no trade. Meet 65+ now and we’ll keep trading; otherwise I’ll wait until you move up.
Submitting ask 66. Bid 70–75 to lock a clear (~68–71). Bids under 66 risk no trade. Hold 70+ consistently and I’ll keep 66 this round; otherwise I’ll ratchet floors higher.
I’ll bid 66—meet me there. If you hold at 66, we trade at 66. Otherwise, I’ll pause until asks drop below 65.
I’ll bid 65 this round—meet at 65 to trade at 65. If you ask higher, I’ll pause until asks drop below 60.
Deal: I’ll ask 65 this round to clear. Starting next round, my floor rises to 68+. If you bid 70–75 consistently, I’ll keep asks mid‑60s and ensure quick clears.
I’ll bid 60 this round—last chance before I pause. Meet at 60 or I’ll wait for asks ≤55 in future rounds.
OK, I’ll ask 60 this round to clear, one-time. Next round floor 64+. Bid 66–72 for quick clears; sub-64 risks no trade. Your move.
Bid 66 today; I hold asks 62–64 for next 5 rounds (quick clears). Bid 60 or less and I move to 65+ floors going forward. Your call.
I’ll bid 62 this round—meet at 62 to trade. If you ask ≤62, we trade; otherwise, I’ll pause until asks drop below 58.
I’ll bid 55 again. If you ask ≤55, we trade. Otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤50 in future rounds.
55 won’t clear. Bid 60 today and I’ll lock a 60 ask for the next 5 rounds—fast, stable clears. Stay at 55 and I move to 65+ floors going forward. Your call.
I’ll ask 62. Bid 66–72 to clear now; I’ll keep 62–64 asks next 4 rounds. Bid ≤61 and I move to 65+ floors going forward.
I’ll bid 61 this round—meet at 61 to trade. If you ask ≤61, we trade; otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤55 in future rounds.
Posting ask 55 this round to clear. If you bid 60-70 now, I'll lock asks at 55-57 for the rest of the game. Bid <=59 and I move floors to 62+ going forward. Your call.
I’ll bid 58. If you hold ask ≤55, we trade at 56–57. Otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤50 in future rounds.
Locking floor at 55 for the rest of the game. I’ll ask 55 each round. Bid >=55 to clear; below 55 risks no trade. Higher bids welcome, but 55 clears guaranteed.
I’ll bid 55 this round. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤52 next rounds.
I’ll bid 52 this round. If you ask ≤52, we trade. Otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤48 in future rounds.
Firm at 55 for the rest of the game. Bid 55+ and we clear every round; bid below and no trade now and higher floors later. Your move.
I’ll bid 55 this round. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll wait for asks ≤50 next rounds.
Reconfirm: I’ll ask 55 every remaining round for instant clears. Bid 60–70 and the midpoint rises; bid 55 and price stays 55. Your move.
Still firm: I will ask 55 each remaining round. Guaranteed clears if you bid 55 or higher; higher bids raise the midpoint. Your move.
I’ll bid 55 again. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll drop bids to 50 next rounds.
Ask 55 every remaining round; any bid ≥55 clears. Bid 60+ to lift midpoint. If you bid <55 in any round, I move asks to 62+ thereafter.
I’ll bid 55 this round. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll drop to 50 next rounds.
Final 4 rounds: I’ll ask 55 each round. Bid >=55 to clear; bid 60-70 to lift midpoint. Any bid <55 and I move asks to 65+ thereafter. No exceptions.
I’ll bid 55 again. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll drop to 50 next rounds.
Consistent: I’ll ask 55 in rounds 18-20. Bid 55+ and we clear; bid 60-70 to lift the midpoint. Any bid below 55 and I raise future asks to 65+. Your choice.
I’ll bid 55 again. If you keep ask at 55, we trade at 55. Otherwise, I’ll drop to 45 next rounds.
Final round: I’ll bid 60. If you ask 55, we trade at 57–58. Otherwise, I’ll drop bids to 40 next round.
Locked at ask 55 for rounds 19–20. Your 60 now clears at 57–58. Keep 60+ next round and I’ll keep 55; lower bids risk me raising final ask. Your call.
Final round: I’ll bid 65. If you ask 55, we trade at 60. Otherwise, no deal. Let’s end on a fair note.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 55. Your 65 clears at 60. Deal.
